message:
refactor(agent): clean up safety barrier tool execution with owned ToolCall cloning

Further refine execute_tool_calls() safety barrier implementation:
- Restore AgentEventHandler type alias parameter (instead of &Arc)
- pending_parallel now stores (usize, ToolCall) owned clones for
  cleaner lifetime management in async contexts
- Inline flush_parallel logic for better borrow-checker compatibility
- Maintain the read-only (parallel) vs side-effect (sequential) barrier
  pattern with proper abort signal checking throughout

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
